titleInfo.title: 河井荃廬研究年表：附河井荃廬著作目録
Kawai Senro kenkyū nenpyō: Fu Kawai Senro chosaku mokuroku
A Chronology of Research on Senro Kawai: With an Appendix of His Publications

mods.abstract:
[Taishan][JSY][Kawai Senro]: The calligrapher and seals-collector KAWAI Senro 河井荃廬, apprentice of WU Changshuo 吴昌碩, had drawn the characters from JSY on a wall in his house. No photograph found so far. Unfortunately, Kawai lost his life in his home as it was bombed and completely burned down on 1945-03-10; thus there might be no further evidence of this painting left. 突当りは壁 朱にぬりて 石經峪之大字をあらわしたり in: pp. 140-141.
This was mentioned by a visit of MIMURA Chikusei 三村竹清 on the 1919-01-21 in: Mimura Chikusei nikki kenkyūkai 三村竹清日記研究会 [The Research Group of Chikusei Mimura’s Diary]. “Fushū sōdō nichireki (10) 不秋草堂日暦（十） [Reprint of Chikusei Mimura’s Diary, Fushusodo Nichireki, vol. 10]”. Engeki kenkyū: Engeki hakubutsukan kiyō 演劇研究：演劇博物館紀要 [Studies in Dramatic Art], vol. 25 (2002). Tōkyō: Waseda daigaku Tsubouchi hakase kinen engeki hakubutsukan 早稲田大学坪内博士記念演劇博物館 [The Tsubouchi Memorial Theatre Museum, Waseda University].
Original source can be ordered here: https://www.waseda.jp/enpaku/publication/1799/.

titleInfo.title: 公益財團法人日本習字教育財團學術研究助成成果論文集
Kōeki zaidan hōjin Nihon shūji kyōiku zaidan gakujutsu kenkyū josei seika ronbunshū
